name: html-docs
description: Convert Markdown plans, reports, PR writeups, research notes, and general docs into rich, standalone adjacent HTML artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Turn Markdown docs into readable standalone HTML.
interface.longDescription: HTML Docs converts Markdown plans, status reports, PR writeups, research notes, and general documentation into polished self-contained HTML files written beside the source document.
defaultPrompt: Convert this Markdown plan into HTML.
Make a readable HTML PR writeup.
Port this research doc to HTML.
